title: Peruvian Bean Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Peru, adapted with Mexican flavors. Kidney beans and mildly spicy peppers come together to create a delicious and comforting dish.

ingredients.name: kidney
ingredients.notes: red kidney beans, drained and rinsed

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add diced bell pepper and cook for an additional 3 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add cumin, chili powder, and cayenne pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add beef broth, dried aji amarillo peppers, kidney beans, and pinto beans.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
